requirement_title: Natural Language Form Field Modification with SHACL Validation

TC-S5-001-01.description: Enter 'Add an email field for contact email', verify field created with type='text', validationPattern includes '@'

TC-S5-001-02.description: Verify generated SHACL shape has sh:path='schema:email' and sh:pattern for email validation

TC-S5-001-03.description: Enter 'Add a phone number field', verify field has sh:pattern for phone validation

TC-S5-001-04.description: Enter 'Add a name field for applicant full name', verify field has alphanumeric-only validation pattern

TC-S5-001-05.description: Click 'View SHACL' icon, verify dialog displays complete JSON-LD SHACL shape for all form fields

TC-S5-001-06.description: Modify form by adding a field, verify SHACL shape updates automatically in real-time

TC-S5-001-07.description: Enter invalid email 'testexample.com' in email field, verify validation error displayed inline

TC-S5-001-08.description: Enter name with numbers 'John123', verify validation error 'Name must contain only letters'

TC-S5-001-09.description: Enter 'Remove the phone number field', verify field removed and SHACL shape updated

TC-S5-001-10.description: Enter ambiguous command 'Add a field', verify clarification request from AI

TC-S5-001-11.description: Copy SHACL shape to clipboard, verify valid JSON-LD format

TC-S5-001-12.description: Add date field, verify sh:datatype='xsd:date' and sh:pattern for ISO date format
